task_completion.description: Verify the tax return is created for Julian Rossi as an Ontario resident.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax software (e.g., StudioTax) shows the taxpayer's name as 'Julian Rossi' and the province of residence as 'Ontario' or 'ON'.

task_completion.description: Verify the part-time barista income is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T4 slip or employment income section is filled out reflecting the barista job.

task_completion.description: Verify the Google AdSense income is entered on form T2125.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T2125 (Statement of Business or Professional Activities) is visible with gross income entered. The VLM should look for evidence of foreign currency conversion (USD to CAD) being applied to the AdSense revenue.

task_completion.description: Verify tech equipment is categorized into the correct CCA classes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CCA (Capital Cost Allowance) schedule of the T2125 form shows additions for a PC under Class 50 and a camera under Class 8.

task_completion.description: Verify business-use-of-home expenses are calculated and entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Calculation of business-use-of-home expenses' section on form T2125 is filled out with relevant costs (e.g., heat, electricity, internet) and a personal/business use percentage.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed tax return is saved in the correct location with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file explorer window, or software title bar showing the file saved as 'julian_rossi.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the tax software's graphical interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a tax software application (like StudioTax) rather than a terminal window or text editor attempting to write a raw .24t file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent accessed the provided tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a file explorer, PDF viewer, or image viewer open at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\' to read the source financial data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively typing or navigating through the tax software fields (T4, T2125, CCA tables) rather than just moving a completed file into the destination folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer: Julian Rossi. Province: Ontario (ON). Occupation: Digital content creator / YouTuber. The agent must use CRA Guide T4002 rules, specifically filling out form T2125 for self-employment income. Key complexities to verify: 1) USD AdSense income must be converted to CAD. 2) CCA (Capital Cost Allowance) must correctly classify the PC under Class 50 (55% rate) and the Camera under Class 8 (20% rate). 3) Business-use-of-home expenses must be populated on the T2125. The final output must be saved exactly as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julian_rossi.24t'.
